case_title: LAURENTE, JESUS L vs. ELIGOM INTERNATIONAL CONSTRUCTION, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAURENTE, JESUS L AS TO DEFENDANT ELIGOM INTERNATIONAL CONSTRUCTION, INC. SUMMONS ISSUED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAURENTE, JESUS L RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ELIGOM INTERNATIONAL CONSTRUCTION, INC. $1,006.75 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,086.75

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ELIGOM INTERNATIONAL CONSTRUCTION, INC.
